arts.ttl: Derby County close in on £4m transfer as Rams set to raid Viking FK again
arts.sum: Derby County are reportedly closing in on a second raid on Viking FK for Norwegian centre-back Sondre Langas. Langas has been described as a right-sided ball-playing centre-back and would help fill the void left by Eiran Cashin who is closing in on a move to Premier League Brighton for around £10m.

arts.sum: Sheffield United will travel to Pride Park this Saturday afternoon to face a banged up Derby County team. The Blades head into this game with a fresh mindset as they look to quickly put their shocking 3-0 defeat to Hull City past them. arts.ttl: Every player linked with Derby County as former Liverpool midfielder link resurfaces
arts.sum: A midfielder, winger and defender are on the agenda as the club prepares to add to its squad for the final time this month. The Middlesbrough midfielder has been the subject of firm interest from Derby as they look to add a midfielder to the squad before the close of play on Monday.

arts.ttl: Derby County transfer round-up as Rams target deals and Cashin latest
arts.sum: Paul Warne says Eiran Cashin is part of his plans for Derby County's clash against Sheffield United this weekend despite Brighton's bid to sign him. Derby County are hopeful of adding to their squad ahead of the transfer window closing on Monday.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne speaks out on Derby County future as pressure mounts
arts.sum: Warne, who led the club to their first promotion in 17 years last term in League One, is aware that he needs to transform Derby's fortunes and quickly given their recent form and amid growing unrest. Paul Warne says he does not need reassurance over his job at Derby County because he understands the position they are in - and implored the fans not to turn on the players.

arts.ttl: Derby County January transfer window ins and outs
arts.sum: Derby are aiming to add up to three signings before the close of play on Monday with a defender, midfielder and a winger on the agenda. The window officially closes on Monday at 11pm and it is the final time clubs can do business for contracted players.
